## Source: ghsa-malware (eb50d21021a3346c3f03904c0b8c2340536083ea8529e020ac7c9f4a97860432)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (f6511110b5695ace5b67288aeb0800934628b5a510045ccf1f62c84011e73951)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'cucumber_json_schema' @ 90002.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
